title: Headset settings are changed
scenario: Headset settings changed in Poly Studio Mobile app are not reflected correctly on the Lens tenant Inventory or Device user profile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Note the current settings values (e.g., ANC mode, EQ preset, Transparency mode, etc.).
4. Log in to the Lens tenant (Inventory or Device user profile) via a web browser.
5. Locate the registered headset and verify that its settings match the values observed in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and change a setting value (e.g., toggle ANC from On to Off, or change an EQ preset).
7. Refresh the Lens tenant page for the same headset.
8. Verify that the changed setting value is now reflected on the Lens tenant.
expected: Settings changed in the Poly Studio Mobile app are accurately reflected on the Lens tenant (Inventory or Device user profile) after refreshing the page.
